name: ListSettlementRefunds
description: List all refunds included in a specific settlement. Refunds are subtracted from the total settlement amount since they represent money returned to customers. This shows all refund transactions that reduced the payout amount for this settlement. You can optionally embed the full payment details for each refund.

settlement_id.description: The ID of the settlement to retrieve refunds for (e.g., 'stl_jDk30akdN').

from_.description: The refund ID to start retrieving the list from (for pagination).

limit.description: The maximum number of refunds to return per page. Valid range is 1-250, defaults to 50 if not specified.

embed.description: Embed additional information. Set to 'payment' to include the full payment object for each refund.
